_phase4Note: Updated April 2026 — testMatch now matches .test.ts files (was .test.js). Jest currently has NO TS transform configured; the 2 tests still using @jest/globals (tests/end_of_day_report.test.ts, tests/invoice_matching_live.test.ts) require ts-jest or @swc/jest installation before they can be run. Until then, these tests are quarantined and `npm run test:jest` will not pick up TypeScript source. The remaining ~30 tests already use node:test and run via `npm test` (node native test runner via tsx). Migrating the 2 jest tests off jest.unstable_mockModule is queued in Phase 5.
